title: Fix authentication flow: replace broken custom auth buttons with Internet Identity default popup

requirements.text: On RegisterPage Step 2 ('Authenticate' step), remove the current custom authentication buttons and the stuck 'Connecting...' state. Replace with a single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button that directly calls the `login()` function from `useInternetIdentity` hook without any custom method selection logic. Clear any stuck loading state on mount so the button is always clickable when the user arrives at Step 2. Remove the 'Authentication cancelled or failed. Please try again.' error that persists from a previous failed attempt.

quotes: Register Step 2 pe button 'Connecting...' stuck hai aur 'Authentication cancelled or failed' error aa raha hai
Seedha Internet Identity ka default popup use karunga — ek single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button hoga

acceptanceCriteria: Step 2 shows a single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button (not Google/Apple/Microsoft/Passkey separate buttons)
Button is always enabled and clickable when Step 2 is rendered — no stuck 'Connecting...' state on load
Clicking the button triggers the Internet Identity native popup directly via the useInternetIdentity login() function
No stale error message ('Authentication cancelled or failed') is shown when arriving at Step 2
If authentication fails or is cancelled, an error message is shown but the button resets to clickable state immediately

requirements.text: On LoginPage, remove the AuthMethodButtons component (Google, Apple, Microsoft, Passkey separate buttons) and the 'CHOOSE METHOD' UI. Replace with a single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button that directly calls the `login()` function from `useInternetIdentity` hook. The button must be fully clickable and functional — no disabled or non-interactive state on initial render.

quotes: Login page pe Google, Apple, Microsoft aur Passkey buttons click hi nahi ho rahe
Dono jagah se custom authentication buttons hata dunga — Seedha Internet Identity ka default popup use karunga

acceptanceCriteria: LoginPage shows a single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button replacing the Google/Apple/Microsoft/Passkey buttons
The button is immediately clickable on page load with no disabled or stuck state
Clicking the button opens Internet Identity's native popup directly
After successful authentication, the existing profile-fetch and redirect logic runs as before
The AuthMethodButtons component is no longer used on LoginPage

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts) — they are immutable
Use only the existing login() function from useInternetIdentity hook — do not introduce a new auth client
Do not change backend logic or data models
nonGoals: Adding new authentication providers beyond Internet Identity
Changing the overall page layout or visual theme
Modifying Step 1 or Step 3 of the registration flow
